_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Mad Dog in the Fog
venues.note: Lower Haight British pub that is a legendary SF soccer institution; opens early for English and international fixtures.

venues.name: Kezar Pub
venues.note: Haight-Ashbury pub by Kezar Stadium; long-standing soccer-watching crowd.

venues.name: Danny Coyle's
venues.note: Haight Street Irish pub that opens for early kickoffs.

venues.name: The Chieftain Irish Pub
venues.note: SoMa Irish pub; shows Premier League and internationals, central for downtown fans.
